headline: Corning (GLW) Stock Is Trending Overnight: Here's What Is Going On
summary: Corning shares climbed Tuesday after AT&T announced a $250 billion U.S. connectivity investment, boosting demand for the company's fiber and connectivity products.

raw.headline: Corning (GLW) Stock Is Trending Overnight: Here's What Is Going On

headline: Deleted Tweet From Energy Secretary Sends Oil Markets on Another Wild Ride
summary: A plunge in oil prices intensified in the early afternoon after Energy Secretary  Chris Wright  said on X that “The U.S. Navy successfully escorted an oil tanker through the Strait of Hormuz to ensure oil remains flowing to global markets.”  U.S. officials soon after said that the military isn’t currently escorting commercial ships through one of the world’s chokepoints for oil and natural gas.  “A video clip was deleted from Secretary Wright’s official X account after it was determined to be incorrectly captioned by Department of Energy staff,” an agency spokesperson said.

headline: Oil Crashes 10%, Stocks Rebound On Trump End-Of-War Signals: What's Moving Markets Tuesday?
summary: U.S. stocks rose broadly on Tuesday as crude oil plunges over 10% on Trump's Iran end-of-war signals. Traders also await Oracle's earnings.

headline: Leverage Shares by Themes Debuts WLDU, Delivering 2X Global Equity Exposure, and GLWG Single-Stock ETF
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes is pleased to announce the launch of two new 2X leveraged ETFs, available for trading beginning March 10, 2026. Built for active traders seeking dynamic ways to engage with potentially high-growth innovators, the new ETFs are designed with the goal of helping investors amplify returns (up & down) while actively participating in daily market performance. Headlining the launch is WLDU – the Leverage Shares 2X Long World
